display.name: Aurora Curtains
display.author: prism
display.blurb: Vertical curtains of green and teal light shimmering across a polar night sky, undulating slowly with the music.

annotation.technical_notes: A central custom shape, textured with a high-frequency noise pattern, is deformed by a per-pixel warp field. As the camera zooms in, frame feedback via sampler_main creates persistent trails that eventually fracture into a field of glowing, organic filaments. The high-frequency glittering of the green and blue cells is modulated by the treble and mid bands of the audio.
